release_notes: Implemented an Encrypted Credentials Vault system to secure third-party credentials (API keys, bot tokens, email passwords) via AES-128/256 Fernet encryption. Includes vault-first secret resolution, thread safety locks, anti-corruption safeguards, platform-specific restricted permissions (icacls on Windows), and forced vault writes for WebUI onboarding & OAuth flows.

changes.note: Updated documentation version to 0.9.5 and added vault features.
Bumped packaged update manifest to v0.9.5.
Hardened vault operations with locks, strict error handling, path-aware caches, and icacls support.
